chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Misc. Application No.S-302 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 24.11.2017. Mr. Muhammad Nadeem Tagar, Advocate alongwith applicant. Syed Meeral Shah A.P.G. for the State. Private respondents are present. The alleged detainees have appeared. Alleged detainee Mst. Beebal states that applicant is her brother and maternal uncle of Mst. Rozina and Mst. Shamil and that they are illegally confined by their husbands and want to live with their mother and applicant Ghulam Hussain. The detainees are set free and are at liberty to reside as per their wish. This application in above terms stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
